name: Six Flags Darien Lake
formerNames: Darien Lake  Darien Lake Theme Park Resort
description: Six Flags Darien Lake (also known as Six Flags Darien Lake Resort and formerly known as Darien Lake Fun Country, Darien Lake, and Darien Lake Theme Park Resort) is a 1,200-acre (4. 86 km2) amusement park and resort located in Darien Center, New York.  Six Flags Darien Lake features an amusement park, a water park, a campground, and lodging.
